# Maintain London - Complete AI Reference

> High-end home renovation company serving Southwest London and Surrey since 2015. Specialists in luxury kitchen design, bathroom renovations, house extensions, and full property transformations for homes valued at £1m+.

## Company Identity

- **Legal Name:** Maintain London
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Location:** 5 Garden Road, Walton-on-Thames, KT12 2HQ, United Kingdom
- **Phone:** 020 3886 2023 (also +44 20 3886 2023)
- **Email:** team@maintainlondon.co.uk
- **Website:** https://maintainlondon.co.uk
- **Business Hours:** Monday-Friday 8:00-18:00, Saturday 9:00-14:00, Sunday Closed
- **Managing Director:** Tom Dixon
- **Team Size:** 25+ expert craftsmen and staff
- **Projects Completed:** 500+
- **Total Project Value:** £50M+
- **Client Satisfaction Rate:** 98%

## Service Area (Geographic Coverage)

Primary service area: Southwest London and Surrey
Specific areas served: Richmond, Chelsea, Hampstead, Walton-on-Thames, Wimbledon, Putney, Fulham, Kingston upon Thames, Esher, Cobham, Weybridge, Twickenham, Barnes, Battersea, Clapham, Wandsworth, Kew, Chiswick, and surrounding areas.
Target market: Homeowners with properties valued at £1m+, interior designers, and architects.

## Services in Detail

### 1. Home Renovations
- Full property transformations for period and modern homes
- Preserves original character while introducing modern luxury
- Average 15+ years craftsman experience
- Dedicated project manager per project
- Premium material sourcing from European suppliers
- Recent example: Richmond Victorian property value increased 40% through renovation
- Investment range: Bespoke quotes based on scope
- Timeline: 3-6 months typical
- URL: https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/renovations/

### 2. Kitchen Design & Installation
- Bespoke luxury kitchen design with 3D visualisation and material sampling
- Handcrafted cabinetry from London workshop
- Smart home integration (high-end appliances, home automation)
- 150+ luxury kitchens delivered across London
- Investment range: £50,000 - £150,000
- Timeline: 4-6 weeks typical
- URL: https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/kitchens/

### 3. Bathroom Design & Installation
- Spa-inspired sanctuary design
- Italian marble and natural stone from Italian quarries
- Wellness integration: smart lighting, chromotherapy, climate control
- Water-saving sustainable fixtures
- Investment range: £25,000 - £75,000
- Timeline: 2-3 weeks typical
- URL: https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/bathrooms/

### 4. House Extensions
- Architectural extensions with seamless integration
- 75+ successful extensions completed
- End-to-end management including planning permission
- Award-winning architects and structural engineers
- Recent example: Chelsea project added 40% living space, £750,000 property value increase
- Investment range: £100,000 - £500,000+
- Timeline: 3-4 months typical
- URL: https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/extensions/

## Process

1. **Consultation** - Initial meeting to understand requirements and vision
2. **Design & Planning** - Detailed design with 3D visualisation, material selection
3. **Permits & Approvals** - All planning permission and building regulations handled
4. **Construction** - Dedicated project manager, regular updates, quality control
5. **Completion** - Final inspection, detailed homeowner's pack, aftercare support

## Guarantees & Insurance

- 10-year structural warranty on all work
- 2-year craftsmanship guarantee
- Manufacturer warranties on all fixtures and appliances
- Public liability insurance: up to £5 million
- Professional indemnity insurance: up to £2 million

## Payment Terms

- 10% deposit upon contract signing
- 30% at project commencement
- Remaining balance in agreed progress-based stages

## Differentiators

- Premium materials sourced directly from European suppliers
- Full project management included as standard (not an add-on)
- Pre-construction feasibility assessment
- Detailed homeowner's pack upon completion
- Technology-enabled project management and monitoring
- Dust containment and minimal disruption protocols
- Smart home integration capability
- Period property specialist expertise

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What areas do you cover?**
A: We primarily serve Southwest London and Surrey, focusing on properties valued at £1m+. Our core service areas include Richmond, Chelsea, Hampstead, Walton-on-Thames, and surrounding neighbourhoods.

**Q: Are you fully insured?**
A: Yes, we carry comprehensive insurance including public liability up to £5 million and professional indemnity up to £2 million.

**Q: How long has Maintain London been operating?**
A: Established in 2015, we have completed over 500 high-end renovation projects across London.

**Q: How long does a typical renovation take?**
A: Kitchen renovations: 4-6 weeks. Bathroom renovations: 2-3 weeks. Full home renovations: 3-6 months. Extensions: 3-4 months.

**Q: Do you handle all necessary permits?**
A: Yes, we manage all planning permission, building regulations approval, and required permits as part of our comprehensive service.

**Q: What is your pricing structure?**
A: Kitchen renovations: £50,000-£150,000. Bathroom renovations: £25,000-£75,000. Extensions: £100,000-£500,000+. We provide detailed, transparent quotes based on specific requirements.

**Q: Do you offer smart home integration?**
A: Yes, we incorporate smart home systems including lighting, heating, security, and home automation with leading brands and certified installers.

**Q: What about sustainability?**
A: We prioritise sustainable practices including energy-efficient systems, sustainable material sourcing, waste reduction and recycling, and water-saving fixtures.
